name: The Miners' 9 Golf, Restaurant, and Bar
about: The Miners' Nine is a public 9-hole golf course located in Iron River, Michigan, built on the former Hiawatha Mine site. The venue combines historic charm with natural beauty, offering a picturesque and challenging round for golfers of all skill levels. The facility includes a restaurant and bar serving fresh, seasonal cooking, signature burgers, sandwiches, salads, hearty entrées, and a full selection of craft beer, wine, and cocktails. The venue is currently adding TrackMan-powered indoor simulator suites for year-round play, with plans for casual play, lessons, leagues, and private group sessions. No membership is required to access the golf course or restaurant.
why_golfers_like_it: Historic 9-hole course built on a former mine site with unique scenery
Upcoming TrackMan-powered simulator suites for year-round indoor play
On-site restaurant and bar with a full menu and craft beverages
Public access with no membership required
Suitable for casual play, lessons, leagues, and private events

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant menu with signature burgers, sandwiches, salads, hearty entrées, and weekly specials
Full selection of craft beer, wine, and cocktails available at the bar

simulator_hardware.notes: TrackMan-powered simulator suites coming soon, with details on specific model not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether club rentals are available. It's recommended to bring your own clubs when booking a tee time.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website doesn't mention BYOB policies. However, the venue has its own restaurant and bar serving food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue has a 9-hole course that can be looped for 18 holes. The website doesn't specify the typical time for a round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with a 9-hole course suitable for all skill levels and a restaurant atmosphere that welcomes families.
